title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
company: Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates:
Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates!
